title: Bitcoin for Business
goal: Learn the payment and treasury basics to onboard your company to Bitcoin

title: Biz School Previous Edition
goal: learn the basics of Bitcoin, with a particular focus on its economic rationale, historical context, and social, financial, and business implications.

title: The Bitcoin Journey
goal: Discover Bitcoin fundamentals, including its monetary value proposition, miners, transactions, and wallets.

title: Getting your first bitcoins
goal: Learn how to buy, secure, and manage your first bitcoins independently.

title: Setting up your first Bitcoin node
goal: Understanding, installing, configuring, and using a Bitcoin node

title: Privacy on Bitcoin
goal: Understand and master the principles of privacy protection when using Bitcoin

title: Bitcoin Development Philosophy
goal: Develop deep philosophical understanding of Bitcoin's design principles.

title: How to Create a Bitcoin Community
goal: Easily create and organize a Bitcoin community in your local area

title: RGB programming
goal: Acquire the skills needed to understand and use RGB

title: Tapping into Taproot Assets
goal: Master the Taproot Assets Protocol for multi-asset Bitcoin and Lightning

title: Bitcoin Wallet Architecture
goal: Dive into the cryptographic principles that power Bitcoin wallets.

title: Modern Cryptography Fundamentals
goal: A deep-dive introduction to the science and practice of cryptography.

title: JavaScript and NodeJS Fundamentals
goal: Learn JavaScript programming fundamentals and NodeJS development to build practical applications and tools.

title: System Programming Fundamentals
goal: Build a solid mental model of how computers work at the differents levels to reason about crashes, performance issues, and system behavior.

title: Learning Rust with Bitcoin
goal: Advance your Rust development skills via Bitcoin coding

title: Introduction to Bitcoin & Stablecoin
goal: An In-Depth Look at Bitcoin, Stablecoins, & the Sovereignty That Comes With Them

title: Austrian School of Economics Fundamentals
goal: Discover Austrian economics as an alternative framework for analyzing markets and individual decision-making

title: Bastiat Economic Thought
goal: To gain a deep understanding of the life, influences, opponents, and economic theories of Frédéric Bastiat, a 19th-century French economist and thinker.

title: Hyperinflation Case Studies
goal: Understanding the emergence of hyperinflations in a Fiat world and their consequences

title: The Austrian school of economics
goal: Discover the theoretical and methodological foundations of the Austrian school of economics, its key concepts and its link with Bitcoin.

title: The History of Bitcoin's Creation
goal: Discover the history of the origins, launch, and early developments of Bitcoin.

title: Bitcoin's Pioneering Era
goal: Discover the history of Bitcoin between 2011 and 2012, marked by the cryptocurrency's first economic successes.

title: The Origins of Laissez-Faire Economics
goal: Explore the foundations of 18th-century liberal economic thought, with a focus on the doctrine of laissez-faire, its leading thinkers, and lasting influence.

title: History of Coinage
goal: Explore the historical evolution of money from the Neolithic to the present day

title: Lightning Network Theory
goal: Discover the Lightning Network from a technical perspective

title: Set up Your First Lightning Node
goal: Understand, install, configure, and use a Lightning node

title: Hands-on with Breez Nodeless SDK
goal: Master the Breez Nodeless SDK to build Lightning Network applications without running a node

title: Navigating Your Node with Terminal
goal: Take a deep dive into your lightning node with Terminal

title: Introduction to Bitcoin mining
goal: Understanding Bitcoin mining and proof-of-work from scratch

title: Heat your home while mining bitcoins
goal: Repurpose an Antminer S9 into a DIY heater for home mining, with guided setup.

title: Bitaxe Open Source Mining Mastery
goal: Master the complete Bitaxe ecosystem, from hardware assembly to advanced customization and performance optimization

title: IP networks - From Theory to Practice
goal: Master the fundamentals of IP networks to better configure and troubleshoot them.

title: A Philosophical History of Freedom
goal: Discover the evolution of freedom through the ages, from ancient philosophers to modern challenges.

title: Freedom as a Social Project
goal: Understand the philosophical and historical foundations of individual freedom

title: Spinoza and Bitcoin
goal: Discover the philosophical links between Spinoza's thought and Bitcoin as tools of freedom through the centuries.

title: Mastering BTC Pay Server
goal: Configure a BTC Pay Server instance for a local business

title: Bitcoin Development Fundamentals
goal: Acquire all the foundations to start developing on Bitcoin

title: Programming Bitcoin
goal: Build a complete Bitcoin library from scratch and understand Bitcoin's cryptographic foundations

title: Update Your Online Security
goal: Update password and personal data management. Create a backup, protect against hackers, and raise awareness about mass surveillance.

title: Improve Your Personal Digital Security
goal: Set up a secure, stable and efficient personal digital environment.

title: Building with Elements and Liquid Network
goal: Learn to use and develop with the Elements open-source blockchain platform and its key features

title: Liquid Bootcamp Essentials
goal: Gain a comprehensive understanding of the Liquid Network and the Elements project, and learn how to implement advanced solutions in confidential transactions, tokenization, and decentralized network architecture.

title: Mastering Liquid Engineering
goal: Master the Liquid Network and Elements, from node operations to confidential transactions and asset issuance.

title: Mastering Liquid Development
goal: Build applications on Liquid using developer tools, Liquid Script, and the Simplicity smart contract language

title: What's your Political Leaning?
goal: Understand the complexity of the modern political spectrum to identify your own tendency and situate the major ideological families beyond the left-right divide.
